Title: Provision Windows Server VM (Tier 4)
Description: Provision Technijian Cloud Tier 4 Windows Server VM (4 vCore / 16 GB RAM) in Irvine data center. Configure base OS, networking, RDP access, firewall rules, and join the Technijian management plane. Issue VM hosting Service Order to Client for monthly billing.

Title: Install Runtime Stack on VM
Description: Install Node.js 18+, Playwright with browser binaries, Claude Code CLI, PowerShell 7, Git, and required PowerShell modules. Configure .env vault at project root for credential storage. Verify all components execute end-to-end with a smoke test scrape.

Title: Configure Claude Code Agent
Description: Author the Claude Code system prompt that defines the lead-generation pipeline, allowed tool list, MCP server connections (Microsoft 365 for email, OC Assessor API for property valuation), and subagent definitions for each scraper phase. Lock down tool permissions to scraper / report / email scope.

Title: Build Orchestrator Harness
Description: Author the PowerShell orchestrator that invokes Claude Code in headless / non-interactive mode with the appropriate prompt for each schedule slot (city permits, DRB, just-sold, CDP, enrichment, weekly report). Capture exit codes, structured logs, and timing metrics for each run.

Title: Configure Windows Task Scheduler & Logging
Description: Configure six Task Scheduler entries matching the production cadence (city permits Sun 6 AM, DRB daily check, just-sold Mon-Fri 7 AM, CDP Sun 6:30 AM, enrichment after-each-scrape, report Sun 10 AM). Configure structured log rotation to data/logs/YYYY-MM-DD.log and failure-notification email to Technijian operator after two consecutive recovery failures.

Title: Build DRB Granicus & Legistar Parsers
Description: Author per-city Granicus / Legistar agenda parsers for Newport Beach, Laguna Beach, and other DRB-using cities. Each parser produces a normalized agenda record (meeting date, agenda items, linked plan-set PDF URLs). Package as a per-city configuration so new cities are added without code changes.

Title: Build PDF Title-Block Extractor
Description: Author the PDF download + title-block extraction engine. Use OCR fallback when PDF text layer is missing. Extract owner name, architect / firm name, project address, and APN from the standard title-block layout. Produce confidence-scored output (high / medium / low) and route low-confidence records to a manual-review bucket.

Title: Entity Normalization & Score Integration
Description: Author entity-normalization logic that unwraps LLC / trust ownership, resolves common name variants, and joins to the existing client-fit scoring engine. Add unit tests against captured sample agendas covering all DRB-using target cities.

Title: Build Per-City DRB Configurations
Description: Build the per-city configuration files (HOA list, target value floor, score weights) for all DRB-using target cities. Verify each configuration runs end-to-end against a captured sample agenda.

Title: Build Zillow Just-Sold Scraper
Description: Author the Zillow just-sold scraper with HOA-area filtering, sale-price floor (default $2M, configurable), and 90-day rolling deduplication. Extract address, sale price, sale date, buyer-agent name, brokerage, phone, and email where available.

Title: Build Redfin & Realtor.com Scrapers
Description: Author Redfin and Realtor.com scrapers mirroring the Zillow extraction contract. Cross-reference results across all three sites for completeness; mark single-source records with reduced confidence.

Title: Architecture & OC Assessor Cross-Check
Description: Architect the just-sold record schema, dedup strategy, and confidence scoring. Wire the OC Assessor API integration to cross-check declared sale price against assessed valuation. Wire to the existing client-fit scoring engine.

Title: Test Just-Sold Pipeline End-to-End
Description: Capture sample HTML snapshots for each target HOA area, run the full pipeline against captured fixtures, and verify deduplication, cross-source merge, and scoring behavior.

Title: Build Spokeo Skip-Tracing Automation
Description: Author the Spokeo browser automation (via Playwright) that performs owner skip-tracing for each new lead. Extract phone and email with Spokeo's confidence indicators. Configure CAPTCHA / bot-defense handling and graceful failure when Spokeo blocks the session.

Title: Build Apollo.io Architect Enrichment
Description: Author the Apollo.io API integration that enriches architect / firm contact data. Configure rate-limit handling and quota guardrails so a runaway scrape cannot exhaust the enrichment budget.

Title: Quota Guardrails & Confidence Join
Description: Author the quota guardrails (daily / monthly caps), confidence-scored join logic that attaches enrichment results to source lead records, and the lead-to-contact reporting view.

Title: Build CDP Scrapers (5 Cities + CCC)
Description: Author Coastal Development Permit scrapers for Newport Beach, Laguna Beach, Dana Point, San Clemente, and the California Coastal Commission portal. Normalize CDP records and integrate as a +20 confidence score modifier on existing leads.

Title: Build OC Clerk-Recorder Monitor
Description: Author the OC Clerk-Recorder monitor that searches for construction deeds of trust and LLC / trust property transfers in target HOA areas. Integrate as a +15 confidence score modifier on existing leads.

Title: Score Modifier Calibration
Description: Calibrate the CDP and Clerk-Recorder score modifiers against the 16 hours of foundational work and the existing client-fit scoring engine. Document the modifier weights for the post-go-live calibration memo.

Title: Weekly Tiered Report Generator
Description: Author the weekly tiered-report generator that classifies leads into Tier 1 (Hot, score >= 80), Tier 2 (Warm, score 60-79), and Tier 3 (Watch, score 40-59). Generate the branded DOCX extending the existing template, the CSV for CRM import, and the JSON export for downstream consumers.

Title: Microsoft 365 MCP Email Integration
Description: Configure the Microsoft 365 MCP server connection from the Claude Code agent. Author the email composer that produces an HTML summary email with the DOCX and CSV attached and sends to Kurtis Burkhart on Sunday 10:00 AM Pacific.

Title: Delta Detection & Weekly Archive
Description: Author the delta-detection logic so only NEW leads since the last report are highlighted in the weekly digest. Archive each weekly snapshot to data/reports/YYYY-MM-DD/ for audit and recoverability.

Title: Report Assembly Tests
Description: Capture sample lead datasets covering all three tiers and several edge cases (zero new leads, scoring tie, missing enrichment), run the report assembly end-to-end, and verify DOCX / CSV / JSON / email output.

Title: CTO Architecture Review (Per Phase)
Description: End-of-phase architecture review for Phases 1-6. Each review confirms the phase deliverables are integration-ready, surfaces any cross-phase risks, and authorizes the next phase to proceed. Reviews are time-boxed to one hour per phase.

Title: Production Cutover & Go-Live Authorization
Description: Production cutover checklist execution: credential rotation, scheduled-task validation, log retention check, M365 send authorization, on-call rotation for first two weeks. CTO go-live authorization is required before final acceptance per Section 8.05.

Title: Post-Go-Live Scoring Calibration
Description: After the second weekly report, review pipeline output with Kurtis Burkhart, capture qualitative feedback on lead relevance, and adjust scoring weights or score modifiers accordingly. Produce a calibration memo summarizing changes and rationale.

Title: Operator Runbook & Walkthrough
Description: Author the operator runbook covering day-to-day operations: how to read the weekly report, how to add a new HOA target, how to adjust the sale-price floor, how to escalate a scraper failure, and how to request a Change Order. Deliver a 60-minute live walkthrough to Bryan and Kurtis Burkhart and record for future operator onboarding.

Title: Cloud VM Tier 4 Hosting (Recurring)
Description: Recurring monthly hosting for the Claude Code agent VM: Tier 4 Cloud VM (4 vCore / 16 GB RAM, $35), Windows Server license ($30), Shared Bandwidth ($15), Image Backup ($15), Health Monitoring ($2). Estimated $97 / month. Billed under separate Service Order; thirty (30) day notice to terminate.
